daily_fact: A gas station in New York recently sold a winning lottery ticket worth over $34,000, bringing excitement and hope to the local community.
topline_md: A plane made an emergency landing in the Hudson River with no fatalities, while NYC faces a Code Blue alert due to plunging temperatures and a missing Jersey City teen has prompted a BOLO. Additionally, a Long Island doctor was sentenced for running an oxycodone pill mill.

community.summary_md:
### Community

- Total lunar eclipse visible in NYC area on Tuesday morning; details on how to watch. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
